title: Golden Transcripts, net.Pipe, Differential Tests, Fuzzing, Race, and Benchmarks · Go Semantics Case: Race Leak Benchmark Gate
summary: Tests send one complete request through loopback, compare only status, reuse the implementation as its own oracle, fuzz without invariants, and publish benchmark throughput without fragmentation or adversarial peers. Planned artifact: Add and verify the race leak benchmark gate increment in layered deterministic protocol verification system. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Run race, leak, allocation, benchmark, profiling, and changed-load gates while separating correctness from capacity claims.
Fuzz parser and serializer with seed corpora, fragmentation, invariants, round trips, bounds, no panic, no hang, and retained minimized failures.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Predict Race Leak Benchmark Gate · Theory Race Leak Benchmark Gate
steps.instruction:
theory case — A theory protocol team handles case 9339 in a fuzzing harness varying every legal input segmentation. Build deterministic Go evidence to gate parser work on transcripts, fragmentation, differential, fuzz, and leak evidence; preserve this operating constraint: a timeout must reserve cleanup time and retain the terminal phase; then force a short write and retain the exact transmitted prefix plus remaining count. Browser code models bounded byte and state decisions only. Sockets, listeners, live TLS, proxies, packet capture, fuzz campaigns, races, load, HTTP/2, HTTP/3, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Run race, leak, allocation, benchmark, profiling, and changed-load gates while separating correctness from capacity claims.
